---
title: "FPIK_fall_24"
output: html_document
date: '2024-11-12'
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
##LOADING PACKAGES
library(tidyverse)
library(gtools)
library(plyr)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggsignif)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3_exps"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code <- function(file_path) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data <- read_csv(file_path, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("Verification Code" %in% colnames(data))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path in csv_files) {
  if(has_verification_code(file_path)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data <- read_csv(file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data$bruinID.text <- as.character(data$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data$bruinID.text) & data$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "Bruin_ID", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text", "textboxAge.text", "Bruin ID")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data)) {
        data[[col]] <- as.character(data[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data <- bind_rows(all_data, data)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path, "\n")
  }
}

# Now, all_data_b should have `bruinID.text` as character across all rows

# At this point, all_data contains all the data from files with 'verification code'
# You can now work with this combined dataframe
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path_b <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3b_exps"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files_b <- list.files(folder_path_b, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code_b <- function(file_path_b) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data_b <- read_csv(file_path_b, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("Verification Code" %in% colnames(data_b))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data_b <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path_b in csv_files_b) {
  if(has_verification_code_b(file_path_b)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data_b <- read_csv(file_path_b, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data_b)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data_b$bruinID.text <- as.character(data_b$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data_b$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data_b$bruinID.text) & data_b$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data_b$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "participant", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text", "textboxAge.text")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data_b)) {
        data_b[[col]] <- as.character(data_b[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data_b <- bind_rows(all_data_b, data_b)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path_b, "\n")
  }
}

# Now, all_data_b should have `bruinID.text` as character across all rows

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path_c <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3c_exps"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files_c <- list.files(folder_path_c, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code_c <- function(file_path_c) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data_c <- read_csv(file_path_c, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("Verification Code" %in% colnames(data_c))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data_c <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path_c in csv_files_c) {
  if(has_verification_code_c(file_path_c)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data_c <- read_csv(file_path_c, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data_c)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data_c$bruinID.text <- as.character(data_c$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data_c$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data_c$bruinID.text) & data_c$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data_c$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "participant", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text", "textboxAge.text", "textboxBirthday.text")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data_c)) {
        data_c[[col]] <- as.character(data_c[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data_c <- bind_rows(all_data_c, data_c)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path_c, "\n")
  }
}
# At this point, all_data contains all the data from files with 'verification code'

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path_oa <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3o_data"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files_oa <- list.files(folder_path_oa, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code_oa <- function(file_path_oa) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data_oa <- read_csv(file_path_oa, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("subjectResponseQ4" %in% colnames(data_oa))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data_oa <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path_oa in csv_files_oa) {
  if(has_verification_code_oa(file_path_oa)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data_oa <- read_csv(file_path_oa, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data_oa)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data_oa$bruinID.text <- as.character(data_oa$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data_oa$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data_oa$bruinID.text) & data_oa$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data_oa$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "participant", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text", "textboxAge.text", "textboxBirthday.text")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data_oa)) {
        data_oa[[col]] <- as.character(data_oa[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data_oa <- bind_rows(all_data_oa, data_oa)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path_oa, "\n")
  }
}

# At this point, all_data contains all the data from files with 'verification code'
# You can now work with this combined dataframe
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path_ob <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3bo_data"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files_ob <- list.files(folder_path_ob, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code_ob <- function(file_path_ob) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data_ob <- read_csv(file_path_ob, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("subjectResponseQ4" %in% colnames(data_ob))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data_ob <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path_ob in csv_files_ob) {
  if(has_verification_code_ob(file_path_ob)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data_ob <- read_csv(file_path_ob, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data_ob)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data_ob$bruinID.text <- as.character(data_ob$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data_ob$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data_ob$bruinID.text) & data_ob$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data_ob$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "participant", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text", "textboxAge.text", "textboxBirthday.text")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data_ob)) {
        data_ob[[col]] <- as.character(data_ob[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data_ob <- bind_rows(all_data_ob, data_ob)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path_ob, "\n")
  }
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Specify the path to your folder
folder_path_oc <- "/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/FPIK_3co_data"

# List all CSV files in the folder
csv_files_oc <- list.files(folder_path_oc, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# Function to check if a CSV file has a specific column
has_verification_code_oc <- function(file_path_oc) {
  # Read only the first row to check column names
  data_oc <- read_csv(file_path_oc, n_max = 1, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  # Check if 'Verification Code' column exists
  return("subjectResponseQ4" %in% colnames(data_oc))
}

# Initialize an empty dataframe to store all data
all_data_oc <- tibble()

# Loop through files, load and append if it has the 'Verification Code' column
for(file_path_oc in csv_files_oc) {
  if(has_verification_code_oc(file_path_oc)) {
    # Load the CSV file
    data_oc <- read_csv(file_path_oc, show_col_types = FALSE)
    
    # Ensure bruinID.text exists before modifying it
    if("bruinID.text" %in% colnames(data_oc)) {
      # Convert to character immediately to prevent mismatches
      data_oc$bruinID.text <- as.character(data_oc$bruinID.text)
      
      # Find the first non-missing value of bruinID.text
      first_valid_bruinID <- data_oc$bruinID.text[which(!is.na(data_oc$bruinID.text) & data_oc$bruinID.text != "")][1]
      
      # If a valid ID is found, fill all rows with it
      if(!is.na(first_valid_bruinID)) {
        data_oc$bruinID.text <- first_valid_bruinID
      }
    }

    # Convert other relevant columns to character
    cols_to_convert <- c("textbox_comp_4.text", "textbox_comp_3.text", "textbox_comp.text",
                         "participant", "textboxAge_2.text", "textbox_comp_2.text","textboxAge.text","textboxBirthday.text")
    
    for(col in cols_to_convert) {
      if(col %in% colnames(data_oc)) {
        data_oc[[col]] <- as.character(data_oc[[col]])
      }
    }
    
    # Append to the master dataframe
    all_data_oc <- bind_rows(all_data_oc, data_oc)
    
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file, does not have 'Verification Code' column:", file_path_oc, "\n")
  }
}

# At this point, all_data contains all the data from files with 'verification code'
# You can now work with this combined dataframe
```

```{r}
cheat_a <- all_data %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data <- all_data %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1,button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, textbox_comp_4.text, button_selections_4, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, price2, price3, price4, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_b <- all_data_b %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_b <- all_data_b %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1, button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, textbox_comp_4.text, button_selections_4, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_c <- all_data_c %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_c <- all_data_c %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1, button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, button_selections_4, textbox_comp_4.text, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_oa <- all_data_oa %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_oa <- all_data_oa %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1, button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, button_selections_4, textbox_comp_4.text, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_ob <- all_data_ob %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_ob <- all_data_ob %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1, button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, button_selections_4, textbox_comp_4.text, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_oc <- all_data_oc %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_oc <- all_data_oc %>% select(bruinID.text, label_1, price_1, pictures_1, textbox_comp.text, label_r, price_r, pictures_r, Free_button.numClicks, Market_Price_button.numClicks, overpriced_button.numClicks, label_2r, price_2r, pictures_2r,  textbox_comp_2.text, button_selections_1, button_selections_2, label_3r, price_3r, pictures_3r,  textbox_comp_3.text, button_selections_3, label_4r, price_4r, pictures_4r, button_selections_4, textbox_comp_4.text, textboxAge.text, subjectResponseQ4, textboxQuestion2.text, button_selection_final, Question, Gender, Ethnicity, textboxAge.text,textboxQuestion2.text, slider.response, slider_online.response)
```

```{r}
cheat_a <- na.omit(cheat_a)
cheat_b <- na.omit(cheat_b)
cheat_c <- na.omit(cheat_c)
cheat_oa <- na.omit(cheat_oa)
cheat_ob <- na.omit(cheat_ob)
cheat_oc <- na.omit(cheat_oc)
write.csv(cheat_oa, "cheat_oa.csv")
write.csv(cheat_ob, "cheat_ob.csv")
write.csv(cheat_oc, "cheat_oc.csv")
```

```{r}
counts_a <- ddply(all_data, .(all_data$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_a) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```


```{r}
counts_b <- ddply(all_data_b, .(all_data_b$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_b) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
counts_c <- ddply(all_data_c, .(all_data_c$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_c) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
counts_oa <- ddply(all_data_oa, .(all_data_oa$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_oa) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
counts_ob <- ddply(all_data_ob, .(all_data_ob$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_ob) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
counts_oc <- ddply(all_data_oc, .(all_data_oc$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_oc) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
all_data$study_type <- 'FPIK_a'
all_data_b$study_type <- 'FPIK_b'
all_data_c$study_type <- 'FPIK_c'

all_data$agegroup <- 'Young'
all_data_b$agegroup <- 'Young'
all_data_c$agegroup <- 'Young'
```

```{r}
all_data_oa$study_type <- 'FPIK_oa'
all_data_ob$study_type <- 'FPIK_ob'
all_data_oc$study_type <- 'FPIK_oc'

all_data_oa$agegroup <- 'Older'
all_data_ob$agegroup <- 'Older'
all_data_oc$agegroup <- 'Older'
```

```{r}

all_data$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data$textbox_comp_2.text)
all_data_b$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data_b$textbox_comp_2.text)
all_data_c$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data_c$textbox_comp_2.text)

all_data$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data$textboxAge.text)
all_data_b$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data_b$textboxAge.text)
all_data_c$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data_c$textboxAge.text)

combined_data <- bind_rows(all_data, all_data_b, all_data_c)

counts_combined_data <- ddply(combined_data, .(combined_data$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_combined_data) <- c("ID", "Freq")

```
```{r}

all_data_oa$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data_oa$textbox_comp_2.text)
all_data_ob$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data_ob$textbox_comp_2.text)
all_data_oc$textbox_comp_2.text <- as.character(all_data_oc$textbox_comp_2.text)

all_data_oa$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data_oa$textboxAge.text)
all_data_ob$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data_ob$textboxAge.text)
all_data_oc$textboxAge.text <- as.numeric(all_data_oc$textboxAge.text)

combined_data <- bind_rows(combined_data, all_data_oa, all_data_ob, all_data_oc)

counts_combined_data <- ddply(combined_data, .(combined_data$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_combined_data) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
all_data_updated <- combined_data
```

```{r}

all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(button_response = case_when(
    !is.na(button_selections_1) & !is.na(button_selections_2) & !is.na(button_selections_3) & !is.na(button_selections_4) ~ 
      paste(button_selections_1, button_selections_2, button_selections_3, button_selections_4, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(button_selections_1) & !is.na(button_selections_2) & !is.na(button_selections_3) ~ 
      paste(button_selections_1, button_selections_2, button_selections_3, sep = " "), # First three columns have values
    !is.na(button_selections_1) & !is.na(button_selections_2) ~ 
      paste(button_selections_1, button_selections_2, sep = " "), # First two columns have values
    !is.na(button_selections_1) ~ as.character(button_selections_1), # Only button_selection_1 is not NA
    !is.na(button_selections_2) ~ as.character(button_selections_2), # Only button_selection_2 is not NA
    !is.na(button_selections_3) ~ as.character(button_selections_3), # Only button_selection_3 is not NA
    !is.na(button_selections_4) ~ as.character(button_selections_4), # Only button_selection_4 is not NA
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # All are NA, or you can choose another default value
  ))
```

```{r}
all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(all_test_label = case_when(
    !is.na(label_r) & !is.na(label_2r) & !is.na(label_3r) & !is.na(label_4r) ~ paste(label_r, label_2r, label_3r, label_4r, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(label_r) & !is.na(label_2r) ~ paste(label_r, label_2r, sep = " "), # Only label_r and label_2r are not NA
    !is.na(label_r) & !is.na(label_3r) ~ paste(label_r, label_3r, sep = " "), # Only label_r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(label_2r) & !is.na(label_3r) ~ paste(label_2r, label_3r, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(label_r) & !is.na(label_4r) ~ paste(label_r, label_4r, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(label_2r) & !is.na(label_4r) ~ paste(label_2r, label_4r, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(label_3r) & !is.na(label_4r) ~ paste(label_3r, label_4r, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(label_r) ~ as.character(label_r), # Only label_r is not NA
    !is.na(label_2r) ~ as.character(label_2r), # Only label_2r is not NA
    !is.na(label_3r) ~ as.character(label_3r), # Only label_3r is not NA
    !is.na(label_4r) ~ as.character(label_4r),
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Catch-all for when all are NA
  ))
```

```{r}
# Assuming 'all_data' is your dataframe
all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(test_price = case_when(
    !is.na(price_r) & !is.na(price_2r) & !is.na(price_3r) & !is.na(price_4r) ~ paste(price_r, price_2r, price_3r, price_4r, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(price_r) & !is.na(price_2r) ~ paste(price_r, price_2r, sep = " "), # Only price_r and price_2r are not NA
    !is.na(price_r) & !is.na(price_3r) ~ paste(price_r, price_3r, sep = " "), # Only price_r and price_3r are not NA
    !is.na(price_2r) & !is.na(price_3r) ~ paste(price_2r, price_3r, sep = " "), # Only price_2r and price_3r are not NA
    !is.na(price_r) & !is.na(price_4r) ~ paste(price_r, price_4r, sep = " "), # Only price_2r and price_3r are not NA
    !is.na(price_2r) & !is.na(price_4r) ~ paste(price_2r, price_4r, sep = " "), # Only price_2r and price_3r are not NA
    !is.na(price_3r) & !is.na(price_4r) ~ paste(price_3r, price_4r, sep = " "), # Only price_2r and price_3r are not NA
    !is.na(price_r) ~ as.character(price_r), # Only price_r is not NA
    !is.na(price_2r) ~ as.character(price_2r), # Only price_2r is not NA
    !is.na(price_3r) ~ as.character(price_3r), # Only price_3r is not NA
    !is.na(price_4r) ~ as.character(price_4r), # Only price_3r is not NA
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Catch-all for when all are NA or empty
  ))
```

```{r}
# Assuming 'all_data' is your dataframe
all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(all_textbox_comp = case_when(
    !is.na(textbox_comp.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_2.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_3.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_4.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp.text, textbox_comp_2.text, textbox_comp_3.text, textbox_comp_4.text, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(textbox_comp.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_2.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp.text, textbox_comp_2.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp.text and textbox_comp_2.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_3.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp.text, textbox_comp_3.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp.text and textbox_comp_3.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_2.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_3.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp_2.text, textbox_comp_3.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp_2.text and textbox_comp_3.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_4.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp.text, textbox_comp_4.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp_2.text and textbox_comp_3.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_2.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_4.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp_2.text, textbox_comp_4.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp_2.text and textbox_comp_3.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_3.text) & !is.na(textbox_comp_4.text) ~ paste(textbox_comp_3.text, textbox_comp_4.text, sep = " "), # Only textbox_comp_2.text and textbox_comp_3.text are not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp.text) ~ as.character(textbox_comp.text), # Only textbox_comp.text is not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_2.text) ~ as.character(textbox_comp_2.text), # Only textbox_comp_2.text is not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_3.text) ~ as.character(textbox_comp_3.text), # Only textbox_comp_3.text is not NA
    !is.na(textbox_comp_4.text) ~ as.character(textbox_comp_4.text), # Only textbox_comp_3.text is
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Catch-all for when all are NA or empty
  ))
```

```{r}
# Assuming 'all_data' is your dataframe
all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(all_pictures = case_when(
    !is.na(pictures_r) & !is.na(pictures_2r) & !is.na(pictures_3r) & !is.na(pictures_4r) ~ paste(pictures_r, pictures_2r, pictures_3r, pictures_4r, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(pictures_r) & !is.na(pictures_2r) ~ paste(pictures_r, pictures_2r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_r and pictures_2r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_r) & !is.na(pictures_3r) ~ paste(pictures_r, pictures_3r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_r and pictures_3r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_2r) & !is.na(pictures_3r) ~ paste(pictures_2r, pictures_3r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_2r and pictures_3r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_r) & !is.na(pictures_4r) ~ paste(pictures_r, pictures_4r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_2r and pictures_3r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_2r) & !is.na(pictures_4r) ~ paste(pictures_2r, pictures_4r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_2r and pictures_3r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_3r) & !is.na(pictures_4r) ~ paste(pictures_3r, pictures_4r, sep = " "), # Only pictures_2r and pictures_3r are not NA
    !is.na(pictures_r) ~ as.character(pictures_r), # Only pictures_r is not NA
    !is.na(pictures_2r) ~ as.character(pictures_2r), # Only pictures_2r is not NA
    !is.na(pictures_3r) ~ as.character(pictures_3r), # Only pictures_3r is not NA
    !is.na(pictures_4r) ~ as.character(pictures_4r), # Only pictures_3r is not NA
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Catch-all for when all are NA or empty
  ))
```



```{r}
counts <- ddply(all_data_updated, .(all_data_updated$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts) <- c("ID", "Freq")
```

```{r}
# added code
numParticipants = length(unique(all_data_updated$bruinID.text))

write.csv(all_data_updated, "FPIK_data214.csv")

all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(agegroup = as.character(agegroup)) %>% 
  mutate(agegroup = trimws(agegroup))

all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  filter(!is.na(agegroup))




#change button_respose column variable names to simplify 
for (i in 1:numParticipants){ 
  all_data_updated$button_response[all_data_updated$button_response ==  paste0("[\"overpriced_button_",as.character(i), "\"]")] <- "Overpriced"
  
  all_data_updated$button_response[all_data_updated$button_response == paste0("[\"Market_Price_button_",as.character(i), "\"]")] <- "Market Price"
  
  all_data_updated$button_response[all_data_updated$button_response == paste0("[\"Free_button_",as.character(i),"\"]")] <- "Free" } 

all_data_updated$button_response <- ifelse(grepl("overpriced",  all_data_updated$button_response), "Overpriced", all_data_updated$button_response)

all_data_updated$button_response <- ifelse(grepl("Market_Price",  all_data_updated$button_response), "Market Price", all_data_updated$button_response)

all_data_updated$button_response <- ifelse(grepl("Free",  all_data_updated$button_response), "Free", all_data_updated$button_response)

all_data_updated$button_response <- ifelse(grepl("Market Price",  all_data_updated$button_response), "Market Price", all_data_updated$button_response)

all_data_updated$button_response <- ifelse(grepl("Overpriced",  all_data_updated$button_response), "Overpriced", all_data_updated$button_response)

all_data_updated$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Free",  all_data_updated$all_test_label), "Free", all_data_updated$all_test_label)

all_data_updated$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Market Price",  all_data_updated$all_test_label), "Market Price", all_data_updated$all_test_label)

all_data_updated$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Overpriced",  all_data_updated$all_test_label), "Overpriced", all_data_updated$all_test_label)

```




```{r}
all_data_updated$bruinID.text <- gsub("[\r\n]", "", all_data_updated$bruinID.text)
#exclude said they cheated
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "X2106746")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906032986")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905751859")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906139770")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806403004")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "805992086")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905751859")
#all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806403004")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806281325")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806290481")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "805917011")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905751859")

all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "305679362")

all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "705838868")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "105740148")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "405")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "6233362")


#young adult that cheated or were distracted
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906230745")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "405822190")

all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "X2106746")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "106141098")

all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "205766595")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "506092779")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "506198813")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "306013405")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "306233643")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "606026500")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806510831")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905927364")	
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "506187720")
#good particpants but evening out the different counterbalancing
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906359597")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906188204")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906448018")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "906290145")


#older adult that cheated or were distracted
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "559d9916fdf99b1e2b2dc6b8")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "66e0d9689d92e205dd35a371")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "56bfcce79f7a1e0005fdca9e")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "66eb8427a91699e7d2eefc29")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "5cba50bf114fa5001aac5570")

#did not all end in 9
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "506038495")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905485484")

all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "205970290")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "506291298")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "806292933")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "66719e649384370db5e1b1c9")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "63fcde3494055a563c72cb12")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "678ea24f169692eabdd0a18a")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "669d549f141da67f8c0986d2")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "611e6cebefce9efe7cef106e")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "67a7cd7721f0ffb08b53")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "5989")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "65959bfed43a65c4d24b7445")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "
5c6b646349b7f0000120b659")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "561d98e03d7fe8000b0f5e09")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "628f5572a2d1304b9e1a3766")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "638fdf87700dd1228bade2e1")

#older adults 
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "64360d6189dec3ac8afc9a78")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "67672ae601aa0551d537d6dd")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "667e0913f425e8bb080c1d1a")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "65539b10563ff255d290")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "650d9650bb81532e8e16d578")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "678b84af19e334ec7d6caaa4")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "5806ceacf0740c00017892c8")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "63f4021039d138e8425201c7")

#extras
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "706-270-068")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905696392")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905958614")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "905815173")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "60f728553a37102574b585c4")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "574ce0a57fd0ec000db73aa6")
all_data_updated <- subset(all_data_updated, all_data_updated$bruinID.text!= "763f4021039d138e8425201c7")

all_data_updated_cheat <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, textboxQuestion2.text)
all_data_updated_cheat <- na.omit(all_data_updated_cheat)

rangeAge = range(na.omit(all_data_updated$textboxAge.text))

meanAge = mean(na.omit(all_data_updated$textboxAge.text))

SDAge = sd(na.omit(all_data_updated$textboxAge.text))

counts_updated_all <- ddply(all_data_updated, .(all_data_updated$bruinID.text, all_data_updated$study_type), nrow)
names(counts_updated_all) <- c("ID", "study_type", "Freq")

hm_a <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_a")
hm_b <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_b")
hm_c <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_c")

hm_oa <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_oa")
hm_ob <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_ob")
hm_oc <- subset(counts_updated_all, counts_updated_all$study_type == "FPIK_oc")


```

```{r}
age_ <-all_data_updated %>% select(agegroup, textboxAge.text)
age_ <- drop_na(age_)

age_$agegroup <- as.factor(age_$agegroup)

age_$agegroup <- as.character(age_$agegroup)
age_$agegroup <- trimws(age_$agegroup)  # Remove extra spaces

# Convert back to factor to ensure proper grouping
age_$agegroup <- factor(age_$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

write.csv(age_, "age_fpik_data.csv")

age_group_stats <- age_ %>%
  group_by(agegroup) %>%
  summarise(
    rangeAge = paste(range(na.omit(textboxAge.text)), collapse = " - "),
    meanAge = mean(textboxAge.text, na.rm = TRUE),
    SDAge = sd(textboxAge.text, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
age_group_stats
```


```{r}
all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(all_textbox_comp = as.numeric(str_replace_all(all_textbox_comp, "[^0-9.-]", "")))

#accuracy code
all_data_updated$results = ifelse(all_data_updated$button_response == all_data_updated$all_test_label, '1', 
                      ifelse(all_data_updated$button_response != all_data_updated$all_test_label, '0', 'None'))
```


```{r}
#example code, fertilizer would b all_test_label, yield would be accuracy
all_data_updated$results <- as.numeric(as.character(all_data_updated$results))
one.way <- aov(results ~ all_test_label, data = all_data_updated)

summary(one.way)

with(all_data_updated, pairwise.t.test(results, all_test_label, p.adj="bonferroni", paired=F))
```

```{r}
#ggplot code 
#ggplot code 


# find no bruinID columns 

#############################

##Add a code here that makes it so the dataframe all_data_updated only has the columns: bruinID.text, button_response, all_test_label, results 

all_data_figure <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, button_response, all_test_label, results, agegroup)

#then do this code below
all_data_figure = na.omit(all_data_figure)

all_data_figure$all_test_label <- trimws(all_data_figure$all_test_label)

all_data_figure <- all_data_figure[!(is.na(all_data_figure$all_test_label) | all_data_figure$all_test_label == ""), ]

all_data_figure_check4 <- all_data_figure

all_data_figure$results <- as.numeric(all_data_figure$results)



all_data_figure1<-all_data_figure%>%
  group_by(all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(results), list(results = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

all_data_csv <- all_data_figure1



# figure1$results <- as.numeric(as.character(figure1$results)) 

all_data_figure1 <- all_data_figure1 %>%
  select(all_test_label, results, agegroup)

all_data_figure1$results <- as.numeric(all_data_figure1$results)

all_data_figure1 <- all_data_figure1 %>%
  mutate(all_test_label = as.character(all_test_label))

all_data_figure1<-all_data_figure1%>%
  group_by(all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(results), list(results = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()




#figure_average<- merge(average, stand, by = "all_test_label") 

#plotting graph 

figure_test <- ggplot(data = all_data_figure1, mapping = aes(x = all_test_label, y= results, fill - agegroup)) + geom_bar(stat="summary", fun='mean', fill='#A4A4A4', color="darkred") 

figure_test

```

```{r}
#adding addition info
all_data_final_ques <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, button_selection_final, Question, agegroup)
all_data_final_ques<- all_data_final_ques[!is.na(all_data_final_ques$button_selection_final), ]
write.csv(all_data_final_ques, file= "all_data_final_queslong.csv")
# Remove list artifacts from button_selection_final before pivoting
all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(button_selection_final = sapply(button_selection_final, toString))

# Pivot the data wider
wide_data <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Question, 
    values_from = button_selection_final,
    values_fn = ~ paste(unique(.), collapse = ", ")  # Ensures unique responses per ID
  )

write.csv(wide_data, file= "all_data_final_ques.csv")
all_data_final_ques <- read.csv("/Users/kyliealberts/Desktop/UCLA_stuff_2024/All_Data/Fall_24_FPIK/all_data_final_ques.csv")
counts_o <- ddply(all_data_final_ques, .(all_data_final_ques$bruinID.text, all_data_final_ques$attention_cat, all_data_final_ques$price_easy_remember, all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember, all_data_final_ques$Price_hard_remember, all_data_final_ques$cat_hard_remember), nrow)
names(counts_o) <- c("ID", "attention_cat","price_easy_remember", "cat_easy_remember","Price_hard_remember" ,"cat_hard_remember", "Freq")

attention_cat <- data.frame(table(counts_o$attention_cat))
price_easy <- data.frame(table(counts_o$price_easy_remember))
cat_easy <- data.frame(table(counts_o$cat_easy_remember))
price_hard <- data.frame(table(counts_o$Price_hard_remember))
cat_hard <- data.frame(table(counts_o$cat_hard_remember))

all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(attention_cat = case_when(
    attention_cat == "[\"market_final\"]" ~ "Market Price",
    attention_cat == "[\"Overpriced_final\"]" ~ "Overpriced",
    attention_cat == "[\"free_final\"]" ~ "Free",
    attention_cat == "[\"No_final\"]" ~ "No Preference",
    TRUE ~ attention_cat  # Keeps all other values unchanged
  ))

all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(price_easy_remember = case_when(
    price_easy_remember == "[\"market_final\"]" ~ "Market Price",
    price_easy_remember == "[\"Overpriced_final\"]" ~ "Overpriced",
    price_easy_remember == "[\"free_final\"]" ~ "Free",
    price_easy_remember == "[\"No_final\"]" ~ "No Preference",
    TRUE ~ price_easy_remember  # Keeps all other values unchanged
  ))

all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(cat_easy_remember = case_when(
    cat_easy_remember == "[\"market_final\"]" ~ "Market Price",
    cat_easy_remember == "[\"Overpriced_final\"]" ~ "Overpriced",
    cat_easy_remember == "[\"free_final\"]" ~ "Free",
    cat_easy_remember == "[\"No_final\"]" ~ "No Preference",
    TRUE ~ cat_easy_remember  # Keeps all other values unchanged
  ))

all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(Price_hard_remember = case_when(
    Price_hard_remember == "[\"market_final\"]" ~ "Market Price",
    Price_hard_remember == "[\"Overpriced_final\"]" ~ "Overpriced",
    Price_hard_remember == "[\"free_final\"]" ~ "Free",
    Price_hard_remember == "[\"No_final\"]" ~ "No Preference",
    TRUE ~ Price_hard_remember  # Keeps all other values unchanged
  ))

all_data_final_ques <- all_data_final_ques %>%
  mutate(cat_hard_remember  = case_when(
    cat_hard_remember  == "[\"market_final\"]" ~ "Market Price",
    cat_hard_remember  == "[\"Overpriced_final\"]" ~ "Overpriced",
    cat_hard_remember  == "[\"free_final\"]" ~ "Free",
    cat_hard_remember  == "[\"No_final\"]" ~ "No Preference",
    TRUE ~ cat_hard_remember   # Keeps all other values unchanged
  ))

all_data_final_ques$attention_cat <- factor(all_data_final_ques$attention_cat, 
                                            levels = c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "No Preference"))

all_data_final_ques <- drop_na(all_data_final_ques)

write.csv(all_data_final_ques, "all_data_fin_ques_jam.csv")

agg_tbl <- all_data_final_ques %>% dplyr::group_by(agegroup, attention_cat) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(total_count=n(),
            .groups = 'drop')
agg_tbl_pr <- all_data_final_ques %>% dplyr::group_by(agegroup, price_easy_remember) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(total_count=n(),
            .groups = 'drop')
agg_tbl_cat <- all_data_final_ques %>% dplyr::group_by(agegroup, cat_easy_remember) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(total_count=n(),
            .groups = 'drop')
agg_tbl_prh <- all_data_final_ques %>% dplyr::group_by(agegroup, Price_hard_remember) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(total_count=n(),
            .groups = 'drop')
agg_tbl_cath <- all_data_final_ques %>% dplyr::group_by(agegroup, cat_hard_remember) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(total_count=n(),
            .groups = 'drop')


ggplot(all_data_final_ques, aes(x = attention_cat, fill = agegroup)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  labs(x = " ", y = "Count", fill = "Age Group") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16, family = "Times New Roman"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent'),
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.position = c(0.3, 0.8),legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.3),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.3),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) 
```
```{r}
tab <- table(all_data_final_ques$price_easy_remember)
res <- chisq.test(tab)
res
res$stdres
```
```{r}
tab_cat_e <- table(all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember[!is.na(all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember) & all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember != ""])

res_cat_e <- chisq.test(tab_cat_e)
res_cat_e
res_cat_e$stdres
```
```{r}
tab_cat_at <- table(all_data_final_ques$attention_cat)
res_cat_at <- chisq.test(tab_cat_at)
res_cat_at
res_cat_at$stdres
```
```{r}
tab_price_har <- table(all_data_final_ques$Price_hard_remember)
res_price_har <- chisq.test(tab_price_har)
res_price_har
res_price_har$stdres
```
```{r}
tab_cat_har <- table(all_data_final_ques$cat_hard_remember)
res_cat_har <- chisq.test(tab_cat_har)
res_cat_har
res_cat_har$stdres
```



```{r}
all_data_final_ques$price_easy_remember <- factor(all_data_final_ques$price_easy_remember, 
                                            levels = c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "No Preference"))
ggplot(all_data_final_ques, aes(x = price_easy_remember, fill = agegroup)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  labs(x = " ", y = "Count") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.4, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())
```
```{r}
all_data_final_ques <- drop_na(all_data_final_ques)
all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember <- factor(all_data_final_ques$cat_easy_remember, 
                                            levels = c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "No Preference"))
ggplot(all_data_final_ques, aes(x = cat_easy_remember, fill = agegroup)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  labs(x = " ", y = "Count") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.3, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(), axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())
```
```{r}
all_data_final_ques$Price_hard_remember <- factor(all_data_final_ques$Price_hard_remember, 
                                            levels = c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "No Preference"))
ggplot(all_data_final_ques, aes(x = Price_hard_remember, fill = agegroup)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +
  labs(x = " ", y = "Count") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.6, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())
```
```{r}
all_data_final_ques$cat_hard_remember <- factor(all_data_final_ques$cat_hard_remember, 
                                            levels = c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "No Preference"))
ggplot(all_data_final_ques, aes(x = cat_hard_remember, fill = agegroup)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +
  labs(x = " ", y = "Count") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.6, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())
```

```{r}
stand_button <- data.frame(
  all_test_label=c("Free", "Free", "Market Price", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "Overpriced"),
  agegroup = c("Older", "Young", "Older", "Young", "Older", "Young"),
  sd=c(.02, .0197, .0192, .0198, .0129, .0162)
)

all_data_figure1<- merge(all_data_figure1, stand_button, by=c("all_test_label", "agegroup"))

all_data_figure1$agegroup <- factor(all_data_figure1$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

figure_button_bw_y <- ggplot(data=all_data_figure1, aes(x=all_test_label, y= results, fill = agegroup)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+ 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("white", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Category Label", y = "Proportion Correct") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.18, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+  
  #geom_signif(comparisons=list(c("Free", "Overpriced")), annotations="***",
  #            y_position = .98, tip_length = 0, vjust=0.4) + geom_signif(comparisons=list(c("Market Price", "Overpriced")), annotations="***",
 #             y_position = .85, tip_length = 0, vjust=0.4) +
#theme_classic() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=results-sd, ymax=results+sd), width=0.2, colour="gray27", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,1)

figure_button_bw_y
```

```{r}
#want to look into actual prices
#accuracy code for priceresults
all_data_updated$priceresults = ifelse(all_data_updated$all_textbox_comp == all_data_updated$test_price, '1',
                      ifelse(all_data_updated$all_textbox_comp != all_data_updated$test_price, '0', 'None'))

all_data_figure2 <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, all_test_label, priceresults, agegroup)

all_data_figure2 = na.omit(all_data_figure2)

all_data_figure2$priceresults <- as.numeric(all_data_figure2$priceresults)

all_data_check <- all_data_figure2

all_data_check2 <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, all_test_label, test_price, all_textbox_comp, priceresults, button_response, results, agegroup, all_pictures)

all_data_check_withNA <- all_data_check2


all_data_check2 = na.omit(all_data_check2)

counts_updated_all_check <- ddply(all_data_check2, .(all_data_check2$bruinID.text), nrow)
names(counts_updated_all_check) <- c("ID", "Freq")

write.csv(all_data_check2, file= "all_data_fall_24.csv")


all_data_figure2<-all_data_figure2%>%
  group_by(all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(priceresults), list(priceresults = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

all_data_button_results<-all_data_check2%>%
  group_by(bruinID.text, all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(results), list(results = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

write.csv(all_data_button_results, file= "all_data_button_results_fall24.csv")

all_data_csv_ep <- all_data_figure2
all_data_check2$priceresults <- as.numeric(all_data_check2$priceresults)

all_data_price_results<-all_data_check2%>%
  group_by(bruinID.text, all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(priceresults), list(priceresults = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

write.csv(all_data_price_results, file= "all_data_price_results_fall24.csv")

#write.csv(all_data_csv_ep, file= "all_data_csv_ep.csv")

figure_test2 <- ggplot(data = all_data_figure2, mapping = aes(x = all_test_label, y= priceresults)) + geom_bar(stat="summary", fun='mean', fill='#A4A4A4', color="darkred") 

figure_test2
```
```{r}
shop_ <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, agegroup, slider.response)
shop_ <- drop_na(shop_)

shop_online <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, agegroup,slider_online.response)
shop_online <- drop_na(shop_online)

shop_all <- merge(shop_, shop_online, by=c("bruinID.text", "agegroup")) 

shop_all$all_shopping <- shop_all$slider.response + shop_all$slider_online.response

all_data_check2<- merge(all_data_check2, shop_all, by=c("bruinID.text", "agegroup"))
```



```{r}
#anovas check button 
anova_twoway_button <- aov(results ~ agegroup * all_test_label, data = all_data_check2)
summary(anova_twoway_button)

anova_twoway_priceexact <- aov(priceresults ~ agegroup * all_test_label, data = all_data_check2)


summary(anova_twoway_priceexact)


```

```{r}
price_results <- glmer(
  priceresults ~ all_test_label * agegroup  +
    (1 | bruinID.text) + (1 | all_pictures),
  data = all_data_check2,
  family = binomial
)

summary(price_results)

price_results_test <- glmer(
  priceresults ~ all_shopping*agegroup +
    (1 | bruinID.text) + (1 | all_pictures),
  data = all_data_check2,
  family = binomial
)

summary(price_results_test)
```

```{r}
library(emmeans)
emmeans_price_results_label <- emmeans(price_results, ~ all_test_label)
pairs(emmeans_price_results_label)
```
```{r}
emmeans_price_results_age_label <- emmeans(price_results, ~ agegroup*all_test_label)
pairs(emmeans_price_results_age_label)
```

```{r}
button_results <- glmer(
  results ~ all_test_label * agegroup +
    (1 | bruinID.text) + (1 | all_pictures),
  data = all_data_check2,
  family = binomial
)

summary(button_results)

button_results_test <- glmer(
  results ~ all_shopping*agegroup +
    (1 | bruinID.text) + (1 | all_pictures),
  data = all_data_check2,
  family = binomial
)

summary(button_results_test)

#anova(button_results, button_results_test)

#cor.test(all_data_check2$results, all_data_check2$all_shopping)
```


```{r}
all_data_check_3 <- all_data_figure2
all_data_figure2$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Free",  all_data_figure2$all_test_label), "Free", all_data_figure2$all_test_label)

all_data_figure2$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Market Price",  all_data_figure2$all_test_label), "Market Price", all_data_figure2$all_test_label)

all_data_figure2$all_test_label <- ifelse(grepl("Overpriced",  all_data_figure2$all_test_label), "Overpriced", all_data_figure2$all_test_label)

#write.csv(all_data_figure2, file= "all_data_fall_24_price.csv")

all_data_figure2<-all_data_figure2%>%
  group_by(all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(priceresults), list(priceresults = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

stand_exactprice <- data.frame(
  all_test_label=c("Free", "Free", "Market Price", "Market Price", "Overpriced", "Overpriced"),
  agegroup = c("Older", "Young", "Older", "Young", "Older", "Young"),
  sd=c(.0197, .0177, .0198, .0189, .0185, .0181)
)


all_data_figure2<- merge(all_data_figure2, stand_exactprice, by=c("all_test_label", "agegroup"))

all_data_figure2$agegroup <- factor(all_data_figure2$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

figure_exactprice_bw_y <- ggplot(data=all_data_figure2, aes(x=all_test_label, y= priceresults, fill = agegroup)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("white", "black")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Price", y = "Proportion Correct") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.6, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(), axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())  +
#theme_classic() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=priceresults-sd, ymax=priceresults+sd), width=0.2, colour="gray27", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,.75)

figure_exactprice_bw_y
```
```{r}
#make code for them being 10 cents off and see if there is better accuracy for that
all_data_updated$all_textbox_comp <- as.numeric(as.character(all_data_updated$all_textbox_comp))
all_data_updated$test_price <- as.numeric(as.character(all_data_updated$test_price))

# Select necessary columns
all_data_difference <- all_data_updated %>%
  select(bruinID.text, test_price, all_textbox_comp, all_test_label, agegroup)

# Remove rows with NA values
all_data_difference <- na.omit(all_data_difference)

# Calculate the difference
all_data_difference$difference <- all_data_difference$all_textbox_comp - all_data_difference$test_price

all_data_difference$difference <- abs(all_data_difference$difference)

all_data_difference <- all_data_difference %>%
  mutate(resultsten = ifelse(difference <= 0.1, 1, 0))

all_data_resultsten <- all_data_difference

all_data_resultsten <- all_data_resultsten %>% select(bruinID.text, all_test_label, resultsten, agegroup)

all_data_resultsten = na.omit(all_data_resultsten)

all_data_resultsten$resultsten <- as.numeric(all_data_resultsten$resultsten)

all_data_resultsten <-all_data_resultsten%>%
  group_by(bruinID.text, all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(resultsten), list(resultsten = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

all_data_resultstencsv <- all_data_resultsten

write.csv(all_data_resultstencsv, file= "all_data_resultstencsv.csv")

```

```{r}
all_data_difference <- all_data_difference %>%
  mutate(resultsone = ifelse(difference <= 1, 1, 0))

all_data_resultsone <- all_data_difference

all_data_resultsone <- all_data_resultsone %>% select(bruinID.text, all_test_label, resultsone, agegroup)

all_data_resultsone = na.omit(all_data_resultsone)

all_data_resultsone$resultsone <- as.numeric(all_data_resultsone$resultsone)

all_data_resultsone <-all_data_resultsone%>%
  group_by(bruinID.text, all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(resultsone), list(resultsone = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

all_data_resultsonecsv <- all_data_resultsone

write.csv(all_data_resultsonecsv, file= "all_data_resultsonecsv.csv")
```


```{r}
all_data_resultsone_figure<-all_data_resultsone%>%
  group_by(all_test_label, agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(resultsone), list(resultsone = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

stand_resultsone <- data.frame(
  all_test_label=c("Free", "Market Price", "Overpriced"),
  sd=c(.0279, .0262, .0357)
)

all_data_resultsone_figure<- merge(all_data_resultsone_figure, stand_resultsone, by=c("all_test_label"))

figure_resultsone_bw_y <- ggplot(data=all_data_resultsone_figure, aes(x=all_test_label, y= resultsone, fill = agegroup)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
  labs(x = "Price", y = "Proportion Correct") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.7, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+  
  #geom_signif(comparisons=list(c("Free", "Overpriced")), annotations="*",
 #             y_position = .98, tip_length = 0, vjust=0.4) + geom_signif(comparisons=list(c("Market Price", "Overpriced")), annotations="**",
        #      y_position = .85, tip_length = 0, vjust=0.4) +
#theme_classic() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=resultsone-sd, ymax=resultsone+sd), width=0.2, colour="gray27", position=position_dodge(.9)) +
  ylim(0,1)

figure_resultsone_bw_y
```

```{r}
# looking at list

# Ensure label_r is a character column
all_data_updated$label_r <- as.character(all_data_updated$label_r)
all_data_updated$label_2r <- as.character(all_data_updated$label_2r)
all_data_updated$label_3r <- as.character(all_data_updated$label_3r)
all_data_updated$label_4r <- as.character(all_data_updated$label_4r)



# Append list values based on conditions
all_data_updated$list <- ifelse(nchar(trimws(all_data_updated$label_r)) > 0, "list1", NA)
all_data_updated$list2 <- ifelse(nchar(trimws(all_data_updated$label_2r)) > 0, "list2", NA)
all_data_updated$list3 <- ifelse(nchar(trimws(all_data_updated$label_3r)) > 0, "list3", NA)
all_data_updated$list4 <- ifelse(nchar(trimws(all_data_updated$label_4r)) > 0, "list4", NA)

all_data_updated <- all_data_updated %>%
  mutate(all_list = case_when(
    !is.na(list) & !is.na(list2) & !is.na(list3) & !is.na(list4) ~ paste(list, list2, list3, list4, sep = " "), # All columns have values
    !is.na(list) & !is.na(list2) ~ paste(list, list2, sep = " "), # Only label_r and label_2r are not NA
    !is.na(list) & !is.na(list3) ~ paste(list, list3, sep = " "), # Only label_r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(list2) & !is.na(list3) ~ paste(list2, list3, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(list) & !is.na(list4) ~ paste(list, list4, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(list2) & !is.na(list4) ~ paste(list2, list4, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(list3) & !is.na(list4) ~ paste(list3, list4, sep = " "), # Only label_2r and label_3r are not NA
    !is.na(list) ~ as.character(list), # Only label_r is not NA
    !is.na(list2) ~ as.character(list2), # Only label_2r is not NA
    !is.na(list3) ~ as.character(list3), # Only label_3r is not NA
    !is.na(list4) ~ as.character(list4),
    TRUE ~ NA_character_ # Catch-all for when all are NA
  ))

all_data_list <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, button_response, all_test_label, priceresults, results, agegroup, all_list)

#then do this code below
all_data_list = na.omit(all_data_list)

write.csv(all_data_list, file= "all_data_list.csv")

```

```{r}
shop_stat <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, agegroup,slider.response)
shop_stat <- drop_na(shop_stat)

shop_stat_online <- all_data_updated %>% select(bruinID.text, agegroup,slider_online.response)
shop_stat_online <- drop_na(shop_stat_online)
```

```{r}
shop_stat_figure <- shop_stat%>%
  group_by(agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(slider.response), list(slider.response = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

shop_stat_figure$agegroup <- factor(shop_stat_figure$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

shop_stat_graph <- ggplot(data=shop_stat_figure, aes(x=agegroup, y= slider.response)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Grocery Shopping") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.7, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +ylim(0,10)

shop_stat_graph

```

```{r}
t.test(slider.response ~ agegroup, data = shop_stat, var.equal = TRUE)

shop_stat_young <- subset(shop_stat, shop_stat$agegroup== "Young")
shop_stat_older <- subset(shop_stat, shop_stat$agegroup== "Older")

mean(shop_stat_young$slider.response)
sd(shop_stat_young$slider.response)

mean(shop_stat_older$slider.response)
sd(shop_stat_older$slider.response)
```


```{r}
shop_stat_figure_online <- shop_stat_online%>%
  group_by(agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(slider_online.response), list(slider_online.response = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

shop_stat_figure_online$agegroup <- factor(shop_stat_figure_online$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

shop_stat_graph_online <- ggplot(data=shop_stat_figure_online, aes(x=agegroup, y= slider_online.response)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Online Grocery Shopping") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.7, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) + ylim(0,10)

shop_stat_graph_online
```

```{r}
t.test(slider_online.response ~ agegroup, data = shop_stat_online, var.equal = TRUE)

shop_stat_online_young <- subset(shop_stat_online, shop_stat_online$agegroup== "Young")
shop_stat_online_older <- subset(shop_stat_online, shop_stat_online$agegroup== "Older")

mean(shop_stat_online_young$slider_online.response)
sd(shop_stat_online_young$slider_online.response)

mean(shop_stat_online_older$slider_online.response)
sd(shop_stat_online_older$slider_online.response)
```
